name: Fried Ice Cream (Vicki Oldfather)
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup crushed corn flakes (Nut'n Honey flakes are great)
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in a small saucepan and remove from heat.
2. Stir in the brown sugar and cinnamon, blending well.
3. Add the crushed cereal and mix until all ingredients are combined.
4. Form the ice cream into four balls.
5. Roll each ball in the cereal mixture to coat evenly.
6. Cover and place in the freezer.
7. Allow to stand at room temperature for a few minutes before serving.
